title: Poached Silky British Fish Wrap
description: Buttery, silky poached cod rolled in eggfree puff pastry for a quick, Britishstyle wrap thats both indulgent and easy to make.

ingredients.name: Egg‑free puff pastry sheets
ingredients.notes: Use a vegan pastry to keep the dish egg‑free

instructions: Prepare the poaching liquid by combining water, butter, lemon juice, and a pinch of salt in a shallow pan; bring to a gentle simmer.
Place the cod fillet in the liquid, cover, and let it poach for 4–5 minutes until opaque.
While the fish poaches, preheat the oven to 200 °C (400 °F). Cut puff pastry squares, brush lightly with olive oil, and bake for 8–10 minutes until puffed and golden.
Remove the fish from the liquid with a slotted spoon, press gently to remove excess liquid, and allow to cool slightly.
Flake the poached fish with a fork, discarding skin and bones.
In a bowl, mix the flaked fish, vegan cream cheese, dill, capers, and a splash of lemon juice; season to taste.
Lay a puff pastry square on a flat surface and spoon a generous amount of the fish mixture into the center.
Fold the corners over to seal the roll, using a little water at the edges if needed to help it stick.
Place the wrapped fish on a baking sheet and bake for 4–5 minutes until the pastry is crisp; let cool for a minute before slicing in half to serve.
